'''jotakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wackadoodle|wackadoodle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-t-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wackadoodle|wackadoodle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jotakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jotakithi|jotakithi]] || [[word:jotakiji|jotakiji]] || [[word:jotakishi|jotakishi]] || [[word:jotakiki|jotakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jotakuthuthu|jotakuthuthu]] || [[word:jotakujuju|jotakujuju]] || [[word:jotakushushu|jotakushushu]] || [[word:jotakukuku|jotakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jotakuthu|jotakuthu]] || [[word:jotakuju|jotakuju]] || [[word:jotakushu|jotakushu]] || [[word:jotakuku|jotakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jotakufthuf|jotakufthuf]] || [[word:jotakufjuf|jotakufjuf]] || [[word:jotakufshuf|jotakufshuf]] || [[word:jotakufkuf|jotakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jotakethe|jotakethe]] || [[word:jotakeje|jotakeje]] || [[word:jotakeshe|jotakeshe]] || [[word:jotakeke|jotakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jotakothotho|jotakothotho]] || [[word:jotakojojo|jotakojojo]] || [[word:jotakoshosho|jotakoshosho]] || [[word:jotakokoko|jotakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jotakotho|jotakotho]] || [[word:jotakojo|jotakojo]] || [[word:jotakosho|jotakosho]] || [[word:jotakoko|jotakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jotakofthof|jotakofthof]] || [[word:jotakofjof|jotakofjof]] || [[word:jotakofshof|jotakofshof]] || [[word:jotakofkof|jotakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jotakĂŻfthĂŻf|jotakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jotakĂŻfjĂŻf|jotakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jotakĂŻfshĂŻf|jotakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jotakĂŻfkĂŻf|jotakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jotakĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|jotakĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jotakĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|jotakĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jotakĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|jotakĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jotakĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|jotakĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jotakĂŻfthĂŻf|jotakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jotakĂŻfjĂŻf|jotakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jotakĂŻfshĂŻf|jotakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jotakĂŻfkĂŻf|jotakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jotakĂŻfthĂŻf|jotakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jotakĂŻfjĂŻf|jotakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jotakĂŻfshĂŻf|jotakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jotakĂŻfkĂŻf|jotakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jotakĂŠthĂŠ|jotakĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:jotakĂŠjĂŠ|jotakĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:jotakĂŠshĂŠ|jotakĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:jotakĂŠkĂŠ|jotakĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jotakathatha|jotakathatha]] || [[word:jotakajaja|jotakajaja]] || [[word:jotakashasha|jotakashasha]] || [[word:jotakakaka|jotakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jotakatha|jotakatha]] || [[word:jotakaja|jotakaja]] || [[word:jotakasha|jotakasha]] || [[word:jotakaka|jotakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jotakafthaf|jotakafthaf]] || [[word:jotakafjaf|jotakafjaf]] || [[word:jotakafshaf|jotakafshaf]] || [[word:jotakafkaf|jotakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:jotakasha|jotakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:jotakshĂ«sha|jotakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jotakrosha|jotakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jotakmusha|jotakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:jotakyasha|jotakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojotaknkshĂ«sha|gojotaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojotaknkrosha|gojotaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojotaknkmusha|gojotaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojotaknkyasha|gojotaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:jotatakasha|jotatakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jotatakshĂ«sha|jotatakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jotatakrosha|jotatakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jotatakmusha|jotatakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jotatakyasha|jotatakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojotataknkshĂ«sha|gojotataknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojotataknkrosha|gojotataknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojotataknkmusha|gojotataknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojotataknkyasha|gojotataknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jetĂŠkasha|jetĂŠkasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jetĂŠkshĂ«sha|jetĂŠkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jetĂŠkrosha|jetĂŠkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jetĂŠkmusha|jetĂŠkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jetĂŠkyasha|jetĂŠkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojetĂŠknkshĂ«sha|gojetĂŠknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojetĂŠknkrosha|gojetĂŠknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojetĂŠknkmusha|gojetĂŠknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojetĂŠknkyasha|gojetĂŠknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:jotfakasha|jotfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jotfakshĂ«sha|jotfakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jotfakrosha|jotfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jotfakmusha|jotfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jotfakyasha|jotfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojotfaknkshĂ«sha|gojotfaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojotfaknkrosha|gojotfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojotfaknkmusha|gojotfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojotfaknkyasha|gojotfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
